summary: Hey David, what a week! You're sitting at 269.2 lbs now, which means you've crushed 45.8 lbs since you started—that's a huge milestone and a real testament to your consistency with Mounjaro and staying engaged with your data. Your loss rate this past two weeks was 0.75 lbs per week, which is exactly the sustainable pace that leads to lasting results. I noticed you logged 11 days out of 14, so let's aim for capturing those last few days next week—your Dexcom and Garmin give you such valuable insights that every logged day helps you spot patterns. You're doing the real work here, and it shows.
